articles.title: US Stocks Fall as Iran Blockade Restarts; Oil Surges Above $80
articles.summary: Stocks dropped on Monday as investors assessed a tense situation in the Middle East, with President Donald Trump reinstating the US blockade of Iranian ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz.

articles.title: Trump Restarts Iran Blockade as US Plans 20% Hormuz Charge
articles.summary: President Donald Trump reinstated the US blockade of Iranian ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz and demanded a 20% reimbursement on all other cargo shipped through the waterway.

articles.title: SK Hynix ADRs Tumble in Second Trading Day After Korea Selloff

articles.title: Strategy Raises Reserve to $3 Billion With Stock Sale
articles.summary: Michael Saylor’s Strategy Inc. raised about $467 million through the sale of common stock, lifting its cash reserve to roughly $3 billion while refraining from buying or selling Bitcoin.

articles.title: Traders See 50% Chance That Warsh Fed Hikes Rates This Month
articles.summary: Traders see a US interest-rate hike later this month as a coin toss, with a renewed rise in oil prices and hawkish commentary from Federal Reserve officials auguring a swift move to tame inflation.

articles.title: Stock Rally Drives Calpers to 14.8% Return in Fiscal 2026
articles.summary: The California Public Employees’ Retirement System reported a 14.8% gain for its latest fiscal year, with results driven by stocks and private equity.
